title: Reduce Array Size to The Half

testcases.input: arr = [3,3,3,3,5,5,5,2,2,7] Output: 2 Explanation: Choosing {3,7} will make the new array [5,5,5,2,2] which has size 5 (i.e equal to half of the size of the old array). Possible sets of size 2 are {3,5},{3,2},{5,2}. Choosing set {2,7} is not possible as it will make the new array [3,3,3,3,5,5,5] which has a size greater than half of the size of the old array.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Choosing {3,7} will make the new array [5,5,5,2,2] which has size 5 (i.e equal to half of the size of the old array). Possible sets of size 2 are {3,5},{3,2},{5,2}. Choosing set {2,7} is not possible as it will make the new array [3,3,3,3,5,5,5] which has a size greater than half of the size of the old array.

testcases.input: arr = [7,7,7,7,7,7] Output: 1 Explanation: The only possible set you can choose is {7}. This will make the new array empty.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only possible set you can choose is {7}. This will make the new array empty.
